mapper.select: SELECT * FROM subject WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY IF(name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'), 0, 1), score DESC
SELECT * FROM subject WHERE air_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY air_date
SELECT subject_id FROM subject_tag WHERE name = #{tagName} ORDER BY id
